title: 3 Space Facts That Sound Fake

segments.text: Space is hiding things that sound completely made up.
There is a planet where it rains molten glass sideways, at five thousand miles per hour.
There is a cloud in space holding enough alcohol to make billions of drinks.
And a single spoonful of a neutron star would weigh about a billion tons.
Space is also totally silent, because sound cannot travel through a vacuum.
And astronauts say it smells like burnt metal.
Follow for more facts that sound fake but are one hundred percent real.

description: Space facts that sound completely fake but are 100% real. Glass rain, alcohol clouds, and silence. Follow for daily facts!
